info.title: Dehumidifier App API
info.description: API specification for the Dehumidifier Application, covering authentication, account management, project and quotation workflows, product and technical data management, flow system configuration, and dehumidifier calculation services.

parameters.name: token-ttl
parameters.description: Testing only. Access token expiry in seconds. Refresh token expiry will be access token ttl x 2.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: This is for pagination, please input page number to get the corresponding data (Default: 1).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This is for Limit and offset pagination, please input number of data to be shown in one page (Default: 10).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Available fields to search by : `name`, `email`, `user_code`. Please input keyword to search in those fields.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Available fields to sort by: `id`, `name`, `user_code`, `email`, `role`, `is_active`, `created_at`, `updated_at`. Please choose one to sort by.

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Available fields to sort order: `asc`, `desc`. Please choose one to sort order.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter users by role, Available fields: `admin`, `user`, `owner`. Please choose one to filter.

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter users by active status, Available fields: `true`, `false`. Please choose one to filter.

delete.description: Marks the user as inactive using soft delete behavior.

patch.description: Updates the password for the specified user (Admin only).

put.description: Initial upload strategy: upload logo file directly to backend using multipart/form-data.

parameters.name: X-Debug-User-Id
parameters.description: During development Authorization will be bypassed, send user ID using this header. Sample: `X-Debug-User-Id: 1`.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: This is for pagination, please input page number to get the corresponding data (Default: 1).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This is for Limit and offset pagination, please input number of data to be shown in one page (Default: 10).
Available fields to search by: `project_name`, `project_code`, `selection_no`. Please input keyword to search in those fields (Optional).
parameters.name: search
sort_by
parameters.description: Available fields to sort by: `id`, `project_name`, `project_code`, `priority`. Please input keyword to search in those fields (Optional).

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Available fields to sort order: `asc`, `desc`. Please choose one to sort order (Optional).

parameters.name: priorities
parameters.description: Filter projects by one or more priority values. Send multiple values as a comma-separated string. Allowed values: `high`, `medium`, `low`. Example: `high,medium`. This query strings are optional.

parameters.name: owner_user_id
parameters.description: Filter by Owner User ID. This value will be fill to User.ID field. (Optional).

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Filter by projects.calculation_date from this date (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD (Optional).

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter by projects.calculation_date until this date (inclusive). Format: YYYY-MM-DD (Optional).

parameters.name: favorite
parameters.description: Filter by favorite projects, Available fields: `true`, `false`. Please choose one to filter (Optional).

parameters.description: During development Authorization will be bypassed, send user ID using this header. Sample: `X-Debug-User-Id: 1`.

post.description: Main entry endpoint for creating a calculator project and its related data. It generates the project structure, and optionally inserts a default quotation record. The backend also fills several system-managed fields automatically, such as project priority, owner, calculation date, calculation status, and quotation date.

parameters.name: X-Debug-User-Id
parameters.description: During development Authorization will be bypassed, send user ID using this header. Sample: `X-Debug-User-Id: 1`.

put.description: Full update for an existing dehumidifier calculation aggregate. The frontend must provide `project.priority`, `project_information.creator_name`, `project_information.creator_position`, and `calculation.status` in the detail payload. The backend sets `project.owner_user_id` based on the authenticated user and preserves the existing values of `project.calculation_date` and `project_information.quotation_date`.

parameters.description: This is for Limit and offset pagination, please input number of data to be shown in one page. (Default: 5).

parameters.description: Available fields to search by: `project_code`, `project_name`, `selection_no`. Please input keyword to search in those fields (Optional).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Available fields to filter by status: `won`, `lost`, `tender`. Please choose one to filter (Optional).

parameters.name: favorite
parameters.description: Filter quotations marked as favorite. Set to `true` to get only favorite quotations, or `false` to get only non-favorite quotations (Optional).

get.description: The selected price option determines which product price is used in the quotation calculation. The quotation sheet exposes the active price option and its resolved unit price so pricing can be changed directly from the quotation view.

delete.description: Marks the quotation as deleted using soft delete behavior.

parameters.name: flow_air_system_id
parameters.description: ID of flow air system (Optional).

parameters.name: dehumidifier_capacity_min
parameters.description: Minimum dehumidifier capacity, put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has dehumidifier capacity.

parameters.name: dehumidifier_capacity_max
parameters.description: Maximum dehumidifier capacity. Put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has dehumidifier capacity.

parameters.name: pre_cooling_capacity_min
parameters.description: Minimum pre cooling capacity. Put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has pre cooling capacity.

parameters.name: pre_cooling_capacity_max
parameters.description: Maximum pre cooling capacity. Put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has pre cooling capacity.

parameters.name: post_cooling_capacity_min
parameters.description: Minimum post cooling capacity. Put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has post cooling capacity.

parameters.name: post_cooling_capacity_max
parameters.description: Maximum post cooling capacity. Put it with numeric value to filter flow systems that has post cooling capacity.

get.description: Supports range-based filtering using min/max values for dehumidifier, pre cooling, and post cooling capacities.

post.description: Create flow system aggregate using multipart/form-data. Scalar fields are sent as form fields, `image_file` is the main cover image, `options` is sent as a JSON string array, and optional per-option diagram files can be sent using keys like `option_diagram_0`, `option_diagram_1`, and so on.

put.description: Update flow system aggregate using multipart/form-data. Scalar fields are sent as form fields, `image_file` is the main cover image. If `image_file` is not sent, the existing image is retained. `options` is sent as a JSON string array, and optional per-option diagram files can be sent using keys like `option_diagram_0`, `option_diagram_1`, and so on. Existing options are replaced in full.
Replace all option records for the specified flow system.

get.description: Initial upload strategy: files are uploaded directly to backend using multipart/form-data. Backend stores files in server folders such as /images and /documents, then persists generated paths/URLs.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: This is for pagination, please input page number to get the corresponding data (Default: 1).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: This is for Limit and offset pagination, please input number of data to be shown in one page (Default: 10).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Available fields to search by: `model_code`, `series_name`. Please input keyword to search in those fields (Optional).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available values: `capacity_low_to_high`, `capacity_high_to_low`, `power_low_to_high`, `power_high_to_low`, `price_low_to_high`, `price_high_to_low`. Please input one of these values to sort the list (Optional).

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Field to sort by. Available values: `id`, `capacity`, `process_air_flow_cmh`, `model_code`, `model_name`, `series_name`, `total_power_kw`, `unit_price`, `quantity`. Please input one of these values (Optional).

parameters.name: is_active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. Please input `true` or `false` to filter by active status (Optional).

parameters.name: X-Debug-User-Id
parameters.description: During development Authorization will be bypassed, send user ID using this header. Sample: `X-Debug-User-Id: 1`.

capacity_cmh.description: UI field "Capacity (CMH)" in Basic Information. Maps to product_models.capacity_cmh.

process_air_flow_cmh.description: UI field "Process Air Flow (CMH)" in Technical Data. Maps to product_models.process_air_flow_cmh.

capacity_kg_h.description: UI field "Capacity (kg/h)" or "Capacity (20 C, RH 60%)". Maps to product_models.capacity_kg_h.

economy_price.description: Price option value that will be stored as price_option = economy.

medium_price.description: Price option value that will be stored as price_option = medium.

platinum_price.description: Price option value that will be stored as price_option = platinum.

document_file.description: Required single technical data document file uploaded via multipart/form-data. Backend stores the file and generates the document URL automatically.

image_files.description: Required multiple product image files uploaded via multipart/form-data. Send one or more binary files using the same field name image_files.

post.description: Create product model using multipart/form-data aligned to the latest Product Model UI: basic information, price option, media, technical data, and document.

parameters.name: X-Debug-User-Id

put.description: Update product model using multipart/form-data aligned to the latest Product Model UI. Existing document and images are preserved unless replacement files are uploaded.

delete.description: Marks the product model as deleted using soft delete behavior.

bearerAuth.description: Send JWT in standard Authorization header using Bearer scheme.

priority.description: Provided by frontend during full update, usually sourced from calculation detail.

status.description: Provided by frontend during full update, usually sourced from calculation detail.

capacity_cmh.description: Represents the UI field "Capacity (CMH)" in Basic Information and maps to product_models.capacity_cmh.

process_air_flow_cmh.description: Represents the UI field "Process Air Flow (CMH)" in Technical Data and maps to product_models.process_air_flow_cmh.

image_file.description: Required main cover image file uploaded via multipart/form-data.

options.description: JSON string array of FlowSystemOptionRequest. Per-option diagram files can be sent using multipart keys option_diagram_0, option_diagram_1, and so on.

image_file.description: Optional main cover image file uploaded via multipart/form-data. If omitted on update, the existing image is retained.
